availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - Accept, subject to the following: Change language to .cop ; lin2: ϯ ==> *stauros* and accept Freddie's correction ; lin6: Implement Freddie's first correction as follows: <:ⲛⲧⲉⲓⲕⲁⲗⲁϣⲓϣⲧⲉ(?)|alt|ⲛⲧⲉ ⲧⲕⲁⲗⲁϣⲓϣⲧⲉ(?):> and then accept Freddie's second correction as is.

Vote - AcceptText - Commentary: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations. lin2=> ⲧ<:ἐξέδρα(?)=grc|reg|ⲉⲓⲉⲅⲅⲣⲁ:> (add loanword reg) lin6=> ⲛⲧⲉ ⲧⲕⲁⲗⲁϣⲓϣⲧⲉ (add space, change iota to tau); ⲉⲧϩⲓ ⲡⲁⲏⲣ (add space)
Submit - Entered according to the edition. Check Greek loanwords carefully. ἐξέδρα is supposed to hide in ⲧⲉⲓⲉⲅⲅⲣⲁ maybe. I was not confident about what to do.

div.p: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
ⲅⲉⲱⲣⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲉⲡⲟⲛⲩⲭⲟⲥ
ⲡⲉⲧⲛⲁⲧⲁϩⲟ ⲧἐξέδραⲉⲓⲉⲅⲅⲣⲁ
ⲙⲡⲁϩⲟⲩ ⲉⲧⲛⲧⲡⲉ ⲛⲧⲣⲓ
ⲉϥⲛⲁϥⲓ ⲧⲡⲏϣⲉ ⲛϫⲏⲣⲉ
ⲙⲟⲓ ϫⲓⲛ ⲙⲡϣⲱⲗϩ ⲉϩⲣⲁⲓ
ⲛⲧⲉⲓⲕⲁⲗⲁϣⲓϣⲧⲉⲛⲧⲉ ⲧⲕⲁⲗⲁϣⲓϣⲧⲉ ⲉⲧϩⲓ ⲡⲁⲏⲣ
ⲙⲛ ⲡⲣⲟ ⲛαὐθέντηςⲁⲩⲑⲉⲛⲧⲉⲥ
ⲙⲛ ⲧⲃⲁⲓⲙⲟⲟⲩ ⲙⲛ ⲡⲧⲱⲣⲧ
ϣⲱⲡⲉ ⲛκοινόςⲕⲟⲓⲛⲟⲥ
